textByHash.4d9d5b6cd14d16bdb1bf514deabb78d3973a268a: Ain't no honour down here. Never assume otherwise.
textByHash.5f786f8a83d7882218b9c0b330ec907018ad5d6e: Another lovely day in this dung heap.
textByHash.633df90c312acd195b27563500210cfc964dd531: The thieves down here are just small time. The real thieves are the ones who rule.
textByHash.8b1c72cafeb6166a67cb2491fb60e1f0eadceba4: Watch yourself, I don't trust you.
textByHash.b7e4d774211496ba13bd30df38d3b22359b53564: I made a good score the other day.
